title: Adopt OAuth2 with short-lived access tokens for the public API
body: Our current API key model never expires and is hard to revoke per-client. Proposing a switch to OAuth2 client-credentials flow with 1-hour access tokens and refresh tokens, so a compromised token has a bounded blast radius.

comments.body: Agreed — we should also log token issuance so we can audit which client requested what scope.
This also unblocks per-client rate limiting since each token already carries the client_id claim.
